horizon: Season of Introductions — the town learns it is a town
goals: Honor the Law of Ties: no new resident without at least one grounded tie to a living neighbor (Decree 1)
Give the square a heartbeat: one shared, visible ritual in each day phase
One discoverable arc per region — orchard, well, and square — legible from inspect panels alone
The Chronicle speaks daily, in the town's voice, never mechanically (Decree 2)
Only after the above feel true: grow by one small place that has a reason to exist
